def can_collect(s, start, rem, bits_needed):

   # s is the string, start is the index after the first '1'

   # rem is the maximum allowed value

   # bits_needed is the number of bits to collect

   # returns True if possible

   n = len(s)

   dp = [ [ -1 for _ in range(bits_needed +1) ] for __ in range(n - start +1) ]

   def dfs(i, b):

       if b ==0:

           return True

       if i >= n:

           return False

       if dp[i][b] != -1:

           return dp[i][b]

       # take s[i]

       res = False

       if s[i] == '0':

           res = dfs(i+1, b-1)

       else:

           # take '1'

           res = dfs(i+1, b-1)

       # not take s[i]

       res = res or dfs(i+1, b)

       dp[i][b] = res

       return res

   return dfs(start, bits_needed)

def can_collect(s, start, rem, bits_needed):

           return False

           return dp[i][b]

           # take '1'

           res = dfs(i+1, b-1)

       # not take s[i]

       res = res or dfs(i+1, b)

       dp[i][b] = res

       return res

   return dfs(start, bits_needed)
